name: Braised Pheasant
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the cavity of each pheasant lightly with salt and pepper.
2. Arrange sliced vegetables in the bottom of a Crock-Pot.
3. Place the pheasants on top of the vegetables.
4. Cut the bacon slices in half and place them over each breast.
5. Add broth and sherry.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
Serves 2 to 4
